summary: Completed testing of NASSAQ Command Center updates - Iteration 63. All features verified: Teachers card shows 10 (dynamic from DB), user name displayed first in headers across all pages, all dashboard cards show dynamic data from database.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing data from iteration 62
context_for_next_testing_agent: Command Center stats API (/api/admin/command-center/stats) verified working correctly. Returns: 2 schools, 50 students, 10 teachers. All frontend pages display user name first in header format 'مرحباً، [اسم المستخدم]'. Dashboard cards show dynamic data from database.
